items.title: Conversational link and memory-only Socratic seed
evidence: independent reconstruction matched all previously reviewed Git blob SHAs
previous accepted checks: cd packages/workframe && npm test: 26 passed on Linux x64 / Node v22.16.0
previous accepted checks: npm pack --json --ignore-scripts; clean packed install version and status JSON passed
previous accepted checks: real PTY Ctrl+C and Ctrl+D at consent exited 0 without provider invocation
b4c7c6a: child runtime environment reduced to an allowlist plus the selected candidate credential names
b4c7c6a: known credential values are redacted from subprocess stdout, stderr, and errors before display
b4c7c6a: Codex and Claude verification now parses structured assistant result fields and requires exact WORKFRAME_OK
b4c7c6a: OpenAI and OpenRouter verification now parses provider JSON and requires an exact assistant response
b4c7c6a: best/default questions remain unresolved unless the user uses an explicit imperative delegation phrase
b4c7c6a: adversarial regressions cover secret-bearing stderr, argv echo, refusal text, and selection questions
CI run 29347827885: failure at aggregate repository CI; not acceptance evidence
no live provider call, package publication, installation mutation, or non-CLI code change
acceptance: select one existing inference path conversationally without guessing ambiguity
require separate billing-disclosed consent before a minimal verification call
after a verified path, collect preferred name and first objective
print a bounded memory-only mirror without filesystem or installation mutation
package-local and packed-artifact checks pass without live credentials

failures: questioning or qualified language could authorize a provider call
authority-boundary tests did not exercise the complete flow
EOF and interruption were not handled deterministically

verified_repairs: consent questions and qualifiers fail closed
help text states the direct credential transmission boundary truthfully
failures: Codex and Claude failure stderr is printed without secret redaction while child processes inherit the full environment
Codex and Claude verification accepts successful output that merely echoes WORKFRAME_OK from the prompt
OpenAI and OpenRouter verification substring-matches the raw HTTP response body
candidate selection treats best/default questions as delegation
repository CI remains red at aggregate Harness verify

review_focus: prove configured credential values cannot escape through subprocess or provider diagnostics
prove argv echo and non-assistant output cannot verify Codex or Claude
prove refusal or diagnostic text cannot verify OpenAI or OpenRouter
prove best/default questions remain unresolved without explicit imperative delegation
rerun package-local, packed-artifact, PTY, and available CI checks from the exact head

items.title: Truthful runtime and provider capability graph
Explicit apply and rollback authority gates

invariants: Do not modify packages/create-workframe, apps, services, infra, or existing runtime behavior.
Do not read, print, persist, or transmit credential values except directly to the explicitly selected provider after consent.
Do not overwrite, adopt, or mutate an existing setup without explicit approval of a concrete immutable plan.
Do not use a Workframe-hosted or implicit cloud fallback.
Publication remains a separate reviewed release decision.
